name: ticket-booking-performance-test
description: K6 performance test suite for the ticket-booking platform

scripts.smoke: npm run build && k6 run dist/scripts/event-on-sale.smoke.js
scripts.load: npm run build && k6 run dist/scripts/event-on-sale.load.js
scripts.stress: npm run build && k6 run dist/scripts/event-on-sale.stress.js
scripts.spike: npm run build && k6 run dist/scripts/event-on-sale.spike.js
